skill.name: meta-results-funnel-plot-generator
skill.description: Generates formatted meta-analysis results sections for funnel plots, including statistical tables for Egger's test, Begg's test, and Trim and Fill method, plus figure legends in English or Chinese.
skill.summary: Generate standardized meta-analysis results sections from funnel plot data with formatted statistical tables
skill.author: AIPOCH

security_audit.summary: All 68 static analyzer findings are false positives. The scanner flagged 'md' in file extensions and markdown references as 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' (MD5), markdown code fence backticks as 'shell backtick execution', its own audit output as 'System reconnaissance', and a documentation source URL as 'Hardcoded URL'. The Python script performs only text processing via argparse, regex, and print() — no network calls, file I/O, subprocess execution, eval, or environment access. No semantic threats or prompt injection attempts detected in any file.

content.value_statement: Writing meta-analysis results sections manually takes time and risks formatting errors. This skill generates publication-ready funnel plot descriptions, statistical tables, and figure legends from your data in English or Chinese.
actual_capabilities: Generate standardized funnel plot descriptions from statistical data
Format Egger's test, Begg's test, and Trim and Fill tables in Markdown
Produce bilingual reports in English and Chinese
Assemble complete results sections with figure references and legends
Clean and validate LLM-generated outputs for consistent formatting
limitations: Requires pre-computed statistical values as input
Does not perform statistical calculations or hypothesis tests
Output quality depends on the accuracy of provided input data
Only supports English and Chinese output languages

use_cases.title: Systematic Review Reporting
use_cases.description: Generate publication-ready meta-analysis results sections from funnel plot data and statistical test outputs
use_cases.target_user: Clinical researcher conducting systematic reviews and meta-analyses

use_cases.title: Manuscript Preparation
use_cases.description: Speed up journal manuscript drafting with automated formatting of publication bias tables and figure legends
use_cases.target_user: Medical writer preparing manuscripts for journal submission

use_cases.title: Research Reproducibility
use_cases.description: Ensure consistent formatting and structure across multiple meta-analysis reports in a research project
use_cases.target_user: Principal investigator overseeing multiple meta-analysis projects

prompt_templates.title: Basic English Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a meta-analysis funnel plot results section in English. Use the provided funnel plot image, Egger's test statistics, Begg's test statistics, and Trim and Fill data.
prompt_templates.scenario: First-time user creating a standard English-language results section

prompt_templates.title: Basic Chinese Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a meta-analysis funnel plot results section in Chinese. I will provide the funnel plot image and all statistical test results.
prompt_templates.scenario: Generating a report for a Chinese-language medical journal

prompt_templates.title: Custom Statistical Tables
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate the results section with all three statistical tables: Egger's test, Begg's test, and Trim and Fill. Use the provided statistics and format them according to standard meta-analysis reporting guidelines.
prompt_templates.scenario: User needs properly formatted tables with specific statistical fields

prompt_templates.title: Batch Multi-Analysis Processing
prompt_templates.prompt: Process multiple meta-analyses with consistent formatting. For each analysis, I will provide the funnel plot image, complete statistics, and language preference. Apply the same structured workflow to each one.
prompt_templates.scenario: Experienced user processing multiple analyses for a large systematic review

output_examples.input: Funnel plot image showing slight asymmetry + Egger's test (t=2.1, p=0.03) + Begg's test (z=1.8, p=0.07) + Trim and Fill (2 studies imputed) + English
output_examples.output:
**Funnel Plot**

The funnel plot demonstrated slight asymmetry, suggesting possible publication bias (Figure 3). Visual inspection revealed three studies falling outside the 95% confidence interval, with two smaller studies missing from the lower right quadrant.

**Figure 3 Funnel plot of the studies included in the meta-analysis**

**Table 2 Publication bias assessment by Egger's test**
[Formatted Markdown table with beta, SE, t-value, p-value, df]

**Table 3 Trim and fill method of the publication bias by Begg's test**
[Formatted Markdown table with Kendall's score, SE, z-value, p-value]

output_examples.input: Funnel plot image showing symmetry + Egger's test (t=0.8, p=0.42) + Begg's test (z=0.5, p=0.61) + Chinese language
output_examples.output:
**Funnel Plot**

漏斗图显示基本对称，未发现明显的发表偏倚(Figure 3)。所有研究均匀分布在合并效应量的两侧，大部分研究位于漏斗图的中上部。

**Figure 3 Funnel plot of original research included in meta-analysis**

**Table 2 Publication bias test (Egger's test)**
[Formatted Markdown table with Chinese headers]

best_practices: Provide complete statistical values including t-values, p-values, standard errors, and degrees of freedom for accurate table generation
Specify the desired output language as either English or Chinese before starting the report generation
Review the generated tables and descriptions for statistical accuracy before including them in a manuscript
anti_patterns: Providing incomplete statistics and expecting the skill to calculate missing values such as p-values or confidence intervals
Using raw LLM outputs directly without running the assembly script to clean formatting and insert figure references
Mixing languages within a single report generation request instead of choosing one consistent language

faq.question: What input data does this skill require?
faq.answer: You need a funnel plot image, complete statistical test results for Egger's test, Begg's test, and Trim and Fill method, a study title, and a language preference of English or Chinese.

faq.question: Does this skill perform statistical calculations?
faq.answer: No. This skill formats and assembles reports from pre-computed statistics. You must provide the statistical test results from software such as Stata, R, or Comprehensive Meta-Analysis.

faq.question: What languages are supported?
faq.answer: The skill supports English and Chinese output. This affects figure legends, table titles, and the generated description text.

faq.question: How does the assembly script work?
faq.answer: The Python script in scripts/main.py cleans LLM output by removing markdown fences, inserts figure references into the description, and combines all sections into a single formatted report.

faq.question: Can I customize the table formats?
faq.answer: The table structure follows standard meta-analysis reporting conventions. You can customize the output by modifying the prompt templates in references/prompts.md.

faq.question: What if my funnel plot statistics are incomplete?
faq.answer: The skill cannot fill in missing values or calculate statistics. Ensure you have complete results for Egger's test, Begg's test, and Trim and Fill method before starting.
